scripts.validate: node tools/validate-static-site.mjs && node tools/validate-thankyou-context.mjs && node tools/validate-catalog-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-catalog-rule-quiz.mjs && node tools/validate-lead-operations-approval.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-operations-gate.mjs && node tools/validate-form-qa-execution-pack.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-permit-commissioning.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-uncommissioned-section.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-content-registry.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-launch-gate.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-review-pack.mjs && node tools/validate-homepage-object-cta.mjs && node tools/validate-contacts-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-mortgage-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-contextual-conversion.mjs && node tools/validate-lead-source-output.mjs && node tools/validate-form-role-analytics.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-events.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-debug-mode.mjs && node tools/validate-conversion-runtime.mjs && node tools/validate-form-qa-scenarios.mjs && node tools/validate-form-qa-results.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-release.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-publications.mjs && node tools/validate-object-verification-profiles.mjs && node tools/validate-prostornaya-page-verification-safety.mjs && node tools/validate-project-verification-summary.mjs && node tools/validate-project-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/validate-source-collection.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-gates.mjs
scripts.validate:launch-readiness: node --check tools/validate-launch-gates.mjs && node --check tools/build-launch-readiness-report.mjs && node --check tools/validate-launch-operations-gate.mjs && node --check tools/validate-guide-launch-gate.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-gates.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-operations-gate.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-launch-gate.mjs && node tools/build-launch-readiness-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/launch-readiness-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/launch-readiness-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.gates)||data.gates.length!==12||data.summary?.total_gates!==12||data.summary?.passed!==1||data.summary?.blocked!==11||data.summary?.total_profiles!==4||data.summary?.ready_profiles!==0||data.metrics?.form_qa?.not_run!==42||data.metrics?.lead_operations?.total_decisions!==8||data.metrics?.lead_operations?.approved!==0||data.metrics?.lead_operations?.pending!==8||data.metrics?.lead_operations?.activation_enabled!==false||data.metrics?.lead_operations?.ready!==false||data.metrics?.sources?.pending!==14||data.metrics?.projects?.public_ready!==0||data.metrics?.guides?.total!==8||data.metrics?.guides?.index_ready!==0||data.metrics?.guides?.index_blocked!==8||data.metrics?.guides?.source_verified!==7||data.metrics?.guides?.source_review_required!==0||data.metrics?.guides?.source_not_applicable!==1||data.metrics?.guides?.editorial_passed!==1||data.metrics?.guides?.legal_passed!==0||data.metrics?.guides?.legal_not_applicable!==1||data.metrics?.guides?.ready!==false||data.metrics?.campaigns?.prepared_links!==11||data.metrics?.campaigns?.published_placements!==0) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated launch gates: ${data.gates.length}; guide content ready: ${data.metrics.guides.ready}; ready profiles: ${data.summary.ready_profiles}`);'
scripts.validate:source-collection: node --check tools/validate-source-collection.mjs && node --check tools/build-source-collection-report.mjs && node tools/validate-source-collection.mjs && node tools/build-source-collection-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/source-collection-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/source-collection-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.tasks)||data.tasks.length!==14||data.summary?.total_projects!==3||data.summary?.total_tasks!==14||data.summary?.pending_tasks!==14||data.summary?.by_status?.accepted!==0||data.summary?.by_status?.missing!==14) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated source collection tasks: ${data.tasks.length}; accepted: ${data.summary.by_status.accepted}`);'
scripts.validate:project-readiness: node --check tools/validate-project-readiness-report.mjs && node --check tools/build-project-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/validate-project-readiness-report.mjs && node tools/build-project-readiness-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/project-readiness-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/project-readiness-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.projects)||data.projects.length!==3||data.summary?.total_projects!==3||data.summary?.public_ready!==0||data.summary?.requires_recheck!==3||data.summary?.requires_sources!==0||data.summary?.projects_with_noindex!==3) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated project readiness rows: ${data.projects.length}; public ready: ${data.summary.public_ready}`);'
scripts.validate:verification: node tools/validate-project-verification.mjs && npm run validate:object-verification && npm run validate:prostornaya-page-safety && npm run validate:project-verification-summary && npm run validate:project-readiness && npm run validate:source-collection && npm run validate:launch-readiness
scripts.validate:catalog-rule-quiz: node --check assets/js/catalog-rule-quiz.js && node --check tools/validate-catalog-rule-quiz.mjs && node tools/validate-catalog-rule-quiz.mjs
scripts.validate:lead-operations-approval: node --check tools/validate-lead-operations-approval.mjs && node --check tools/build-lead-operations-approval-report.mjs && node tools/validate-lead-operations-approval.mjs && node tools/build-lead-operations-approval-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/lead-operations-approval.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/lead-operations-approval.json","utf8")); if(data.status!=="owner_decisions_required_not_operational"||data.summary?.total_decisions!==8||data.summary?.approved_decisions!==0||data.summary?.pending_decisions!==8||data.summary?.activation_enabled!==false||data.summary?.required_operational_fields!==13||data.summary?.activation_gates!==7) process.exit(1); console.log(`Owner decisions: ${data.summary.approved_decisions}/${data.summary.total_decisions}; pending: ${data.summary.pending_decisions}`);'
scripts.validate:launch-operations-gate: node --check tools/build-launch-readiness-report.mjs && node --check tools/validate-launch-operations-gate.mjs && node tools/validate-launch-operations-gate.mjs
scripts.validate:form-qa-execution-pack: node --check tools/build-form-qa-execution-pack.mjs && node --check tools/validate-form-qa-execution-pack.mjs && node tools/validate-form-qa-execution-pack.mjs && node tools/build-form-qa-execution-pack.mjs --format=json > /tmp/form-qa-execution-pack.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/form-qa-execution-pack.json","utf8")); if(data.status!=="execution_pack_only_no_implied_results"||data.summary?.scenarios!==14||data.summary?.devices!==3||data.summary?.total_slots!==42||data.summary?.slot_checks!==10||data.summary?.device_resilience_cases!==6) process.exit(1); console.log(`QA slots: ${data.summary.total_slots}; recorded: ${data.summary.recorded_results}`);'
scripts.validate:guide-content: node --check tools/validate-guide-content-registry.mjs && node --check tools/build-guide-content-report.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-content-registry.mjs && node tools/build-guide-content-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/guide-content-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/guide-content-report.json","utf8")); if(data.status!=="editorial_registry_not_publication_approval"||data.summary?.total_guides!==8||data.summary?.index_ready!==0||data.summary?.index_blocked!==8||data.summary?.source_verified!==7||data.summary?.source_review_required!==0||data.summary?.source_not_applicable!==1||data.summary?.editorial_passed!==1||data.summary?.legal_passed!==0) process.exit(1); console.log(`Guide registry: ${data.summary.total_guides}; editorial passed: ${data.summary.editorial_passed}; index ready: ${data.summary.index_ready}`);'
scripts.validate:guide-launch-readiness: node --check tools/build-launch-readiness-report.mjs && node --check tools/validate-guide-launch-gate.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-launch-gate.mjs
scripts.validate:guide-review-pack: node --check tools/build-guide-review-pack.mjs && node --check tools/validate-guide-review-pack.mjs && node tools/validate-guide-review-pack.mjs && node tools/build-guide-review-pack.mjs --format=json > /tmp/guide-review-pack.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/guide-review-pack.json","utf8")); if(data.status!=="review_pack_only_no_implied_approval"||data.summary?.total_guides!==8||data.summary?.editorial_tasks!==8||data.summary?.legal_tasks!==7||data.summary?.total_tasks!==15||data.summary?.recorded_results!==1||data.summary?.passed!==1||data.summary?.failed!==0||data.summary?.blocked!==0||data.summary?.not_run!==14) process.exit(1); console.log(`Guide review tasks: ${data.summary.total_tasks}; passed: ${data.summary.passed}; not run: ${data.summary.not_run}`);'
scripts.validate:analytics-funnel: node --check tools/validate-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node --check tools/build-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node tools/validate-analytics-funnel-report.mjs && node tools/build-analytics-funnel-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/analytics-funnel-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/analytics-funnel-report.json","utf8")); if(data.status!=="specification_only_no_live_data"||!Array.isArray(data.metrics)||data.metrics.length!==19||!Array.isArray(data.views)||data.views.length!==6) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated funnel metrics: ${data.metrics.length}; views: ${data.views.length}`);'
scripts.validate:campaign-publications: node --check tools/validate-campaign-publications.mjs && node --check tools/build-campaign-publication-report.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-publications.mjs && node tools/build-campaign-publication-report.mjs --format=json > /tmp/campaign-publication-report.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/campaign-publication-report.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.campaigns)||data.campaigns.length!==11||data.summary?.total_campaigns!==11) process.exit(1); const total=Object.values(data.summary.by_status||{}).reduce((sum,value)=>sum+value,0); if(total!==11) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated campaign publication rows: ${data.summary.total_campaigns}; placements: ${data.summary.total_publications}`);'
scripts.validate:campaign-release: node --check tools/validate-campaign-release.mjs && node --check tools/build-campaign-release-pack.mjs && node tools/validate-campaign-release.mjs && node tools/build-campaign-release-pack.mjs --format=json > /tmp/campaign-release-pack.json && node -e 'const fs=require("fs"); const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("/tmp/campaign-release-pack.json","utf8")); if(!Array.isArray(data.links)||data.links.length!==11) process.exit(1); console.log(`Generated campaign release links: ${data.links.length}`);' && npm run validate:campaign-publications
